calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2026 Continued To Jul-20-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Vehicle Inspection And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Declaration Of Adam J. Trott
Off Calendar Aug-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Counsel for Defendant BMW appeared via Zoom but did not check in with the clerk or check in via the link on the chat window prior to Open Court. No other appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC.'s Motion To Compel Vehicle Inspection And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant BMW of North America, LLC's motion to compel vehicle inspection is granted and its request for monetary sanctions is denied. The inspection must occur on September 5, 2025, the date proposed by plaintiff Seshanna Gooty, or another day that is mutually agreeable. Because Ms.Gooty did not act without substantial justification, monetary sanctions are denied.

Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Seshanna Chinna Gooty'S Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Declaration Of Adam J. Trott
Off Calendar Aug-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Roy Enav, Esq. 310-933-4271 renav@quillarrowlaw.com Quill & Arrow LLP for Plaintiff.
Sharona Silver, Esq. 619-489-3768 sharona.silver@nelsonmullins.com Nelson Mullins for Defendant.

ARGUED. Ms. Silver submits to the tentative ruling. Mr. Enav contests and states the motion lacks a declaration and separate statement; counsel offered available dates for deposition. The Court comments counsel appearing in open court is not counsel who signed the discovery papers. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff Seshanna Chinna Gooty'S Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Declaration Of Adam J. Trott.

Defendant BMW of North America, LLC's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Seshanna Chinna Gooty's Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED.

The discovery at issue is reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. (CCP 2017.010.)

Defendant has failed to demonstrate the merit of any of her protestations.

Plaintiff Seshanna Chinna Gooty shall appear for deposition at the time and location in the notice on August 20, 2025, or a date sooner upon agreement of all parties.

The record does not show Plaintiff acted with substantial justification with respect to this discovery. Plaintiff and counsel Luis Serrano and Quill & Arrow, LLP, jointly and severally, shall pay $800 to Defendant BMW of North America, LLC as sanctions, payable no later than August 29, 2025. (See Code of Civil Procedure sections 2023.010, 2023.030 and 2025.450(g).)

The parties are urged to resolve their dispute regarding the vehicle inspection. That dispute can and should be resolved by the parties without the need for court intervention. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2016.040.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Vehicle Inspection And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Declaration Of Adam J. Trott
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Continued To Aug-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC.'s Motion To Compel Vehicle Inspection And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Declaration Of Adam J. Trott.

Continued to August 22, 2025, on the court's motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
